title: Let It Rain
writer: Wade Boteler, George Crone, Earle Snell
actors: Douglas MacLean, Shirley Mason, Wade Boteler
plot: Riley, a marine sergeant and ringleader aboard ship in the traditional warfare between gobs and leathernecks, falls in love with a telephone girl and breaks arrest to go to her when his pet enemy is about to take shore leave. Toge...
